constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Reference DOM (Asterisk in sibling span): Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text Reference DOM (Placeholder-only identification): Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute Reference DOM (Custom div dropdown): Location picked from custom div dropdown, not native select Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, native-select-not-combobox, aria-label-only, details-accordion, shadow-host. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Asterisk in sibling span; Placeholder-only identification; Custom div dropdown.
